nasb.text: Gladness and joy are taken away from the fruitful field; In the vineyards also there will be no cries of joy or jubilant shouting, No treader treads out wine in the presses, For I have made the shouting to cease.

esv.text: And joy and gladness are taken away from the fruitful field, and in the vineyards no songs are sung, no cheers are raised; no treader treads out wine in the presses; I have put an end to the shouting.

cnv.text: 歡喜快樂都從肥美的田地中被取去了； 葡萄園裡必再沒有歌唱，也沒有歡呼； 踹酒的不能在榨酒池裡踹出酒來； 我止息了歡呼的聲音！

ccb.text: 肥美的田园里听不到快乐的声音， 葡萄园里也无人歌唱欢呼， 榨酒池里无人榨酒。 我已经使欢呼声止息。

csbs.text: 果园中，欢喜和快乐被拿去； 葡萄园里，没有欢唱也没有欢呼； 榨酒池内，不再有踹酒的踹酒； 我使欢呼的声音都止息了！
